description: Single source of truth for all automation request types, CI stage mapping, and routing.

build_iso.description: Full firmware + Windows ISO build pipeline

update_firmware.description: HPE firmware/driver ISO generation via SUT

deploy.description: Deploy ISO to target servers via iLO/Redfish

maintenance_enable.description: Enable maintenance mode for a cluster

maintenance_disable.description: Disable maintenance mode for a cluster

maintenance_validate.description: Validate maintenance window for a cluster

connectivity_check.description: Read-only network + auth connectivity test for SCOM or OneView (safe during change freeze)

gitlab_maintenance.description: Trigger GitLab CI/CD pipeline for maintenance operations

physical_server_build.description: End-to-end physical server build via ConfigMgr + OneView + iLO Redfish

query_oneview_server.description: Query HPE OneView for server identity and health

publish_iso.description: Publish bootable ISO to HTTPS repository

ilo_redfish_mount.description: Mount ISO via iLO Redfish and force boot
